generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
instance EnergyUsageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Patterns of energy consumption across building systems"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metrics related to lighting quality and visual comfort"
]

instance HealthImpactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of building conditions affecting occupant health"
]

instance BIMModelTransformationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into BIM model transformation process"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from building system simulations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of building operational data"
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting levels based on occupancy and light sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACSchedulingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimized HVAC operation scheduling for energy efficiency",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BIMModelTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated transformation of BIM models to DT runtime artifacts",
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelTransformationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time monitoring of building operational parameters",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsageInsight, VisualComfortInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy and comfort optimization, generating actionable insights for building operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthImpactInsight, LightingAdjustmentAction, HVACSchedulingAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building systems for scenario analysis and optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance RevitEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit for BIM model creation and enrichment",
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelTransformationService
]

instance HonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for MQTT/AMQP protocol handling and sensor data ingestion",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin device management and state synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of the digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance MDEFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for automated transformation of BIM to DT artifacts",
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelTransformationService
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor deployed in Living Lab building for capturing thermal data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor deployed in Living Lab building for capturing illumination levels",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor deployed in Living Lab building for capturing presence data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LivingLabBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model of Living Lab structure and systems",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RevitEnabler, MDEFrameworkEnabler
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light intensity data stream from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance SemanticAssetData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Semantic asset data derived from BIM model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFrameworkEnabler
]

instance DeviceConfigData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Device configuration metadata for BCS actuators and sensors",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance MiddlewareMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware metadata for Eclipse Hono and Ditto integration",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting actuator controlling building lighting systems"
]

instance HVACSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator controlling heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building as the physical counterpart for the digital twin",
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACSActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC settings) sent from the DT to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time system modifications."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data and control command execution, enabling immediate updates between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized DT Framework orchestrating BIM models, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular services to enable bidirectional communication and holistic building management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle stages: design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with the DT serving as a dynamic representation throughout the building's life."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess semantic coherence and synchronization accuracy between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT-based communication protocols through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for secure, scalable data exchange between physical devices and the DT."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM as the primary standard for semantic modeling in AECO projects, with standardized extension points for modular service integration in the DT framework."
]
